import{useEffect,useRef,useState,useLayoutEffect}from"react";import"./SellModuleView.scss";import{SellItemComposer}from"@nitrots/nitro-renderer/src/nitro/communication/messages/outgoing/roleplay/SellItemComposer";import{SendMessageComposer}from"../../api";import{RequestInventoryItemsComposer}from"@nitrots/nitro-renderer/src/nitro/communication/messages/outgoing/roleplay/RequestInventoryItemsComposer";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const STORAGE_KEY="sell-module-pos";export const SellModuleView=()=>{const[visible,setVisible]=useState(false);const[inventory,setInventory]=useState([]);const[animateIn,setAnimateIn]=useState(false);// ---- draggable state ----
const containerRef=useRef(null);const[position,setPosition]=useState({x:100,y:100});const dragging=useRef(false);const dragOffset=useRef({x:0,y:0});// Load saved position before first paint (prevents jump)
useLayoutEffect(()=>{try{const saved=localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);if(saved){const pos=JSON.parse(saved);setPosition({x:Number(pos.x)||100,y:Number(pos.y)||100});}}catch{/* ignore */}},[]);useEffect(()=>{const openHandler=()=>setVisible(true);window.addEventListener("open_sell_module",openHandler);return()=>window.removeEventListener("open_sell_module",openHandler);},[]);useEffect(()=>{if(!visible)return;SendMessageComposer(new RequestInventoryItemsComposer());},[visible]);useEffect(()=>{const InventoryStore=require("@nitrots/nitro-renderer/src/nitro/communication/messages/parser/roleplay/InventoryStore").InventoryStore;const handleInventoryUpdate=()=>setInventory(InventoryStore.getItems());window.addEventListener("inventory_update",handleInventoryUpdate);handleInventoryUpdate();return()=>window.removeEventListener("inventory_update",handleInventoryUpdate);},[]);useEffect(()=>{if(visible)requestAnimationFrame(()=>setAnimateIn(true));else setAnimateIn(false);},[visible]);// ---- sell helpers ----
const handleSellAll=item=>{if(!item||item.quantity<=0)return;SendMessageComposer(new SellItemComposer(item.id,item.quantity));};const handleSell=item=>{if(!item||item.quantity<=0)return;SendMessageComposer(new SellItemComposer(item.id,1));};// ---- drag helpers ----
const clampToViewport=(x,y)=>{const el=containerRef.current;if(!el)return{x,y};const rect=el.getBoundingClientRect();const vw=window.innerWidth;const vh=window.innerHeight;const maxX=Math.max(0,vw-rect.width);const maxY=Math.max(0,vh-rect.height);return{x:Math.min(Math.max(0,x),maxX),y:Math.min(Math.max(0,y),maxY)};};const startDragMouse=e=>{dragging.current=true;dragOffset.current={x:e.clientX-position.x,y:e.clientY-position.y};document.body.style.userSelect="none";};const onMouseMove=e=>{if(!dragging.current)return;const nx=e.clientX-dragOffset.current.x;const ny=e.clientY-dragOffset.current.y;setPosition(clampToViewport(nx,ny));};const endDragMouse=()=>{if(!dragging.current)return;dragging.current=false;document.body.style.userSelect="";localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(position));};// touch support
const startDragTouch=e=>{const t=e.touches[0];dragging.current=true;dragOffset.current={x:t.clientX-position.x,y:t.clientY-position.y};document.body.style.userSelect="none";};const onTouchMove=e=>{if(!dragging.current)return;const t=e.touches[0];const nx=t.clientX-dragOffset.current.x;const ny=t.clientY-dragOffset.current.y;setPosition(clampToViewport(nx,ny));};const endDragTouch=()=>{if(!dragging.current)return;dragging.current=false;document.body.style.userSelect="";localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(position));};// global listeners during drag
useEffect(()=>{const mm=e=>onMouseMove(e);const mu=()=>endDragMouse();const tm=e=>onTouchMove(e);const tu=()=>endDragTouch();document.addEventListener("mousemove",mm);document.addEventListener("mouseup",mu);document.addEventListener("touchmove",tm,{passive:false});document.addEventListener("touchend",tu);return()=>{document.removeEventListener("mousemove",mm);document.removeEventListener("mouseup",mu);document.removeEventListener("touchmove",tm);document.removeEventListener("touchend",tu);};},[position]);if(!visible)return null;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{ref:containerRef,className:`sell-module ${animateIn?"pop-in":""}`,style:{position:"absolute",left:position.x,top:position.y,zIndex:1100},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"sell-header",onMouseDown:startDragMouse,onTouchStart:startDragTouch,style:{cursor:"grab"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h4",{children:"Sell Items"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"close-btn",onClick:()=>setVisible(false),children:"\u2716"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"sell-content",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"sell-list",children:inventory.filter(item=>item.item_id===11||item.item_id===10)// show crops
.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"sell-item-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:item.icon_path,alt:item.name,className:"sell-item-icon"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"sell-item-info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:item.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Quantity: ",item.quantity]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"sell-item-action",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"habbo-action-button green",disabled:item.quantity<=0,onClick:()=>handleSell(item),children:"Sell"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"habbo-action-button red",disabled:item.quantity<=0,onClick:()=>handleSellAll(item),children:"Sell All"})]})]},`${item.id}`))})})]});};
